title: Treasure
description: Enhance gameplay by hiding and customizing Treasure Chests across your world.
body: Text Transcript TREASURE | Enhance gameplay by hiding and customizing Treasure Chests across your world. [FREE Discord Support | Full Documented Plugin] > FEATURES: - Fully Customizable GUIs, Messages and Config - Custom Model Data Support - HEX Color code Support - Folia Support - Version Support: 1.21.x - 1.18 > Major Features: - MODERN SETUP SYSTEM VIA CHAT: In the game, you have the ability to easily customize treasure chests to fit your preferences and gameplay style. - EDIT EVERYTHING IN A MODERN GUI: Treasure chests can be fully customized through user-friendly in-game GUIs with ease. - SEE EVERY INFORMATION VIA 1 ITEM: Quickly view and manage all treasure chest settings through one compact, interactive item — no commands needed!
